title: November 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}
'''November 2''' is the 306th day of the year (307th in leap years), with 59 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1932|1932]] - [[Terry Richards]] is born
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Tom Lyle]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Brian Augustyn]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Whit Hertford]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Deadly Reunion]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 20|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 20]] published.
*[[1985]] – "[[Coby and the Starhunters]]" of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars: Droids'']] airs on [[ABC Television Network]].
*1985 – "[[Sunstar vs. Shadowstone]]" of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 124|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 124]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Naomi Ackie]] is born.
*[[2005]] – [[X-Wing: Rogue Leader 2|''X-Wing: Rogue Leader'' 2]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 22|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 22]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: Battles that Changed the Galaxy]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars Year By Year: A Visual History, New Edition]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 206|''Star Wars Insider'' 206]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Bounty Hunters 28|''Bounty Hunters'' 28]] published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars (2020) 29|''Star Wars'' (2020) 29]] published.
*2022 – [[The Mandalorian (2022) 5|''The Mandalorian'' (2022) 5]] published.
*2022 – "[[Nobody's Listening!]]" of ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]'' released.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dawn of Rebellion: The Visual Guide]]'' published in the UK.
<noinclude>
